LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER LIN ANGHOLT'S REQUEST FOR ORDER TO RELEASE PUBLIC RECORDS. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE UNOPPOSED REQUEST FOR AN ORDER APPROVING THE RELEASE OF PUBLIC RECORDS IS GRANTED. ORDER SUBMITTED IS UNDER REVIEW. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Hearing On Requesr For Order To Release Public Records
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER LIN ANGHOLT'S REQUEST FOR ORDER TO RELEASE PUBLIC RECORDS.

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: the unopposed request for an order approving the release of public records is granted. Order submitted is under review. Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/SKF)
